aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: High but scattered

💼 Career: Tum kaafi effort daaloge, par direction unclear rahegi

❤️ Love: Bina soche bolna conflict create karega

💰 Money: Quick decision नुकसान दे सकता है

🧘 Advice: Slow down and align

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum speed pe focus karte ho, clarity pe nahi
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Calm and steady

💼 Career: Tumhara patience reward dene lagega

❤️ Love: Stability aur comfort feel hoga

💰 Money: Safe aur stable growth

🧘 Advice: Apni pace pe trust rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum consistency se hi strong bante ho
gemini:
♊ Gemini

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum multitasking me clarity lose kar dete ho
